# Always confirm the destination folder before writing a new note

**Type:** lesson - **Proposed destination:** `Heuristics/Lessons-Learned.md`
**Evidence:** the agent wrote a note to the wrong folder and had to move it after the owner pointed it out.

This is a near-verbatim restatement of an existing, already-graduated lesson
in the vault ("verify the target path before writing, do not assume") from
three weeks earlier. Same root cause, same fix, different session.

**Why it might NOT get in:** duplicates an existing lesson almost word for word.

*Generated by the daily distiller. Gate: judge decides destination or discard.*
